_comment_web_only: apps/web is a Vercel web-only target. Vercel serverless functions categorically cannot maintain long-lived WebSocket connections, so no WebSocket server is bundled or run here. The browser reaches the api orchestrator exclusively over the env-configured, cross-origin API_BASE_URL / WS_URL (never same-origin); those env values are read by the centralized web client owned by frontend-console (task 13.6), not declared here.
_comment_no_ws: Do NOT add any WebSocket server, rewrite to a socket, or long-running process to this config — the api orchestrator (Fly.io / docker-compose) is the sole WebSocket + PTY host.
